title: SP1900 LTA Liveries Pack [MTR4]
description: A fictional Singapore MRT-inspired livery on the SP1900 (IKK).
body:
**A fictional Singapore MRT-inspired livery on the SP1900 (IKK).**

Thanks for downloading the SP1900_LTA resource pack! Feel free to contact me for more details/improvement! Appreciate it :) A README file can be found in the file.

![A collage of the 5 liveries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3001820a6e8cced902596f0284e8a75f6d0f13d0.jpeg)

CONTENT:
=========================
A repaint pack for the SP1900 (IKK), based on the Singapore MRT liveries. Included in the package: Fictional High Speed Rail (pink), DTL, EWL, NEL, NSL, and TEL liveries.

CREDITS:
=========================
Repainted by AbsurdlySmrt.

REQUIRED MINECRAFT MOD:
=========================
This Resource Pack **requires** the following:


https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway
